commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin-sdk facade manifest lookup to prefer a compatible current metadata snapshot before falling back to filesystem registry discovery, and updates facade runtime tests for Windows path separators and stale-snapshot fallback coverage.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +140. Total +151 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence real runtime reproduction yet. Source inspection shows the old facade path calls loadPluginManifestRegistry on each registry lookup, but the supplied proof does not demonstrate the behavior in a running Gateway or CLI process.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer or contributor needs to provide or explicitly accept real runtime proof; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane to fix right now.
